title: Dungeon Difficulty
description: ☠️ Increase the difficulty and get matching rewards.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/49610e16c8825d1354622e5d523b70573830f3ad.png "")

[![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net)
[![Fabric API required](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric%20API-REQUIRED-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/973561601519149057.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/KN9b3pjFTM)

# ☠️ Location based difficulty

Location based difficulty, based on either one of these:
- dimension
- biome (id/regex/tag)
- structure (id/regex/tag)

Various difficulty types, defaults include:
- Adventure (increasing mob attributes: max HP, damage, armor)
- Dungeon (same as Adventure + increasing power of looted items)
- Heroic (same as Dungeon, with different name to indicate boss fight)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/a2d927606ebac6fd8f58b14e4af2617ca2047ced.png)![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/8ff885d11d0cfcf970db4e9e61e1728cdfc31ee6.png)![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/1de7ed3ae19a93844e1f5453dc979be137fcf1b6.png)![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/ca87e25b4e7ff58800e66038a445721679f83e0a.png)![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/461ada9631f3d326f17e6399949e429df8cb7ca8.png)

Some example mobs:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/516d1932391916515026669cf6071e5859de0ef7.png)

# 🗡️ Loot scaling

Matching the location specific difficulty, items are scaled up:
- Indicated as "Power Level" on the item tooltips
- Predefined attributes (such as attack damage, max health) get added or increased
- Works on defined items and attributes (vanilla and modded)
‌- Reworked item rarity (enchanted items are Uncommon, scaled up items are Uncommon, enchanted + scaled up items are Rare)

This mechanic motivates players for exploration and dungeoneering instead of base camping and crafting.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ENZmbSFZ/images/caadfb601ca69a0e62289a04ac8de7dea15b22d0.png)
‌

# 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Per player difficulty

Additional players in a multiplayer game, silently increase the difficulty.

# 🔧 Fully configurable

This mod has a very flexible configuration, that uses id/regex/tag based matching, allowing
- any combination of dimension, biome and structure to define difficulty
- custom difficulty types to be added
- any attributes to be scaled on looted items (vanilla and mod attributes)

For more details check out the [project readme](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/DungeonDifficulty).
